name: Centuria Industrial Reit
analysis: CIP has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$3.0850. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$3.1050, stop A$2.9304, target A$3.6288 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
